title: % wraps the value around
problem: It's 10 o'clock. What hour shows on a 12-hour clock 5 hours later? (we want 3).

trace.checkpoint_prompt: It's 10 o'clock. After `clock = (start + 5) % 12` runs, what will clock show?

trace.note: clock = (10 + 5) % 12 = 3. The % (remainder) operator wraps the value around 12, so 15 becomes 3. The same wrap-around is what fixed-width numbers do — see Overflow.
